message:
refactor(tests): convert e2e_workflow manual handlers to macros [bd-3lv5]

Replace 7 manual ToolHandler/ResourceHandler/PromptHandler impls with
#[tool], #[resource], and #[prompt] macro-annotated functions:
- EchoToolHandler → #[tool] echo_tool
- CounterToolHandler → #[tool] counter_tool
- FailOnDemandToolHandler → #[tool] fail_on_demand_tool
- StatusResourceHandler → #[resource] status
- ReadmeResourceHandler → #[resource] readme
- HelpPromptHandler → #[prompt] help_prompt
- SystemPromptHandler → #[prompt] system_prompt_handler

Handlers requiring ctx state, dynamic JSON, or binary content kept manual.
All 88 e2e_workflow tests pass unchanged.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
